## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npx wrangler deploy --dry-run`

## Checklist

- [ ] This change is compatible with Cloudflare Workers APIs.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented in `README.md` if needed.
- [ ] Terminal text output remains curl-friendly.
- [ ] Asset aliases are lowercase and unambiguous, if assets changed.
